'''Michael Cumpsty''' was a [[Wikipedia:British|British]] [[Wikipedia:Actor|actor]] and [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|audiobook narrator]]. Cumpsty narrated four ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] abridged audiobook  including [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: The Phantom Menace'' novelization]]<ref name="Episode I" /> and [[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter (abridged audiobook)|''Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter'']].<ref name="Shadow Hunter">[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter (abridged audiobook)|''Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter'' abridged audiobook]]</ref>
